summary: Demonstrates the Phase 3 (TG12) enhanced release report: per-risk-level rollup, explicit untested-high-risk items, an open-bug rollup, flaky-test summary, structured conditional-pass criteria, and external (Jira/TestLink) links. Three risks (2 high, 1 medium): RISK-001 covered passing, RISK-002 (high) covered failing with a Red bug, RISK-003 (medium) uncovered. Recommendation is conditional_pass with explicit, checkable conditions.

flaky_tests.note: Passed on first retry; intermittent timeout on the inventory load step.

release_recommendation_reasoning: RISK-001 (high) is covered_passing. RISK-002 (high) is covered_failing with a Red bug (FAIL-001 / BUG-001) — but a Jira issue exists to track it, so it is a known, triaged defect rather than an unhandled blocker. RISK-003 (medium) is uncovered. No HIGH-severity risk is uncovered (uncovered_high_severity_count = 0), so this is conditional_pass, not fail. Conditions are listed in conditional_pass_criteria.
conditional_pass_criteria: BUG-001 (RISK-002, Red) is fixed or formally accepted by the product owner before release.
A test case is added for RISK-003 (medium, uncovered) or the risk is explicitly accepted at Gate 2.
The TC-001 flakiness (intermittent inventory-load timeout) is investigated; if it recurs, stabilize before promoting the suite to blocking.
open_questions: Is the RISK-003 (medium) coverage gap acceptable for this release, or should a case be added?
